ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the NFL season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number within the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weeks_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player is associated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "recovery_time" TEXT /* Expected recovery time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the football team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the football position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature during the game */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity during the game */,
  "wind_speed" INTEGER /* Wind speed during the game */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Precipitation during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game stat record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "rush_att" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "rush_yds" INTEGER /* Rushing yards */,
  "rush_td" INTEGER /* Rushing touchdowns */,
  "rec_tgt" INTEGER /* Number of times targeted for a reception */,
  "rec" INTEGER /* Number of receptions */,
  "rec_yds" INTEGER /* Receiving yards */,
  "rec_td" INTEGER /* Receiving touchdowns */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "pass_att" INTEGER /* Number of passing attempts */,
  "pass_comp" INTEGER /* Number of passing completions */,
  "pass_yds" INTEGER /* Passing yards */,
  "pass_td" INTEGER /* Passing touchdowns */,
  "int" INTEGER /* Interceptions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy football league */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the league */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team is in */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy football team */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the owner of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES fantasy_leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fantasy team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player on the roster */,
  "roster_status" TEXT /* Status of the player on the roster (e.g., active, bench) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES fantasy_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_team_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the owner is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_owners_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES fantasy_leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the draft is for */,
  "draft_date" TEXT /* Date the draft took place */,
  "rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drafts_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES fantasy_leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the draft */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team making the pick */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player picked */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the draft the pick was made */,
  "pick_number" INTEGER /* Pick number within the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES fantasy_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_draft_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_id") REFERENCES drafts ("draft_id")
)
